source_text: The views expressed herein are based on current conditions, subject to change and may differ from other JPMorgan Chase & Co. affiliates and employees.
target_text: 本文件表達的意見和觀點，均為本公司按目前市場狀況作出的判斷；如有更改，恕不另行通知。

source_text: The views and strategies may not be appropriate for all investors. Investors should speak to their financial representatives before engaging in any investment product or strategy.
target_text: 本文件並非針對特定投資者而編制，且不一定適合所有投資者。投資於任何投資產品或策略之前，投資者務須與其財務代表討論和聯系。

source_text: This material should not be regarded as research or as a J.P. Morgan Research Report.
target_text: 本文件不應視為研究報告或摩根大通研究報告看待。

source_text: Outlooks and past performance are not reliable indicators of future results.
target_text: 前景展望和過往表現並非未來表現的可靠指標。

source_text: It is not possible to invest directly in an index.
Please read additional regulatory status, disclosures, disclaimers, risks and other important information at the end of this material.
target_text: 請參閱本文件末尾所載的其他監管狀況、披露規定、免責聲明、風險和其他重要信息。

source_text: INVESTMENT PRODUCTS: NOT FDIC INSURED, NO BANK GUARANTEE, MAY LOSE VALUE
target_text: 投資產品： 不受聯邦存款保險公司保障 非銀行擔保 可能損失本金

source_text: Outlooks and past performance are no guarantee of future results.
target_text: 前景展望和過往表現不保證未來業績。

source_text: All companies referenced are shown for illustrative purposes only, and are not intended as a recommendation or endorsement by J.P. Morgan in this context.
target_text: 文中提述的公司僅供說明用途而列示，不應視作摩根大通的建議或認可。

source_text: All market and economic data as of April 20, 2026 and sourced from Bloomberg Finance L.P., Haver Analytics and FactSet unless otherwise stated.
target_text: 除非另有說明，否則所有市場和經濟數據均截至2026年4月20日，而資料來源均為彭博財經、Haver Analytics和FactSet。

source_text: Investors may get back less than they invested, and past performance is not a reliable indicator of future results.
target_text: 投資者可能損失本金，過往表現並非未來表現的可靠指標。

source_text: Asset allocation/diversification does not guarantee a profit or protect against loss.
target_text: 資產配置╱多元化不保證錄得盈利或免招損失。

source_text: J.P. Morgan and its affiliates and employees do not provide tax, legal or accounting advice. You should consult your own tax, legal and accounting advisors before engaging in any financial transactions.
target_text: 摩根大通及其關聯公司與僱員不提供稅務、法律或會計意見。您應在作出任何財務交易前咨詢您的獨立稅務、法律或會計顧問。

source_text: Forward-looking statements should not be considered as guarantees or predictions of future events.
target_text: 前瞻性的陳述不應視為對未來事件的保證或預測。

source_text: In Hong Kong, this material is distributed by JPMCB, Hong Kong branch. JPMCB, Hong Kong branch is regulated by the Hong Kong Monetary Authority and the Securities and Futures Commission of Hong Kong.

source_text: In Singapore, this material is distributed by JPMCB, Singapore branch. JPMCB, Singapore branch is regulated by the Monetary Authority of Singapore.
target_text: 在新加坡，本文件由摩根大通銀行新加坡分行分派。摩根大通銀行新加坡分行受新加坡金融管理局監管。

source_text: This material is intended for your personal use and should not be circulated to or used by any other person, or duplicated for non-personal use, without our permission.
target_text: 本文件僅供您個人使用，未經摩根大通的允許不得分發給任何其他人士，且任何其他人士均不得使用，分派或復制本文件的內容供作非個人用途。
